name: Randall Boggs MU
description:
Full Name

Randall Boggs

Alias

Boggs

Randy

Sir (by Fungus)

Lizard Boy (by Mike)

Two-Bit Punk (by Fritz)

Origin

Monsters, Inc.

Occupation

Student at. Monsters University (formerly; graduated)

Member of RPowers / Skills

Wall-crawling skills

High intelligence

Cunning

Invisibility

Intimidation

Technological knowledge

Strength

Speed

Hand-to-hand combat skills

Manipulation

Agility

Charisma

Goals

Fit in with Roar Omega Roar as the cool monsters at college (succeeded, then failed).

Help Waternoose with his plot for the scream extractor to illegally save the company from bankruptcy and solve the energy crisis of Monstropolis.

Fulfill his life as self-benefit by being the top of Monsters, Inc. by either being both the no. 1 employee or the CEO himself, aswell even to overrank Mike & Sulley as revenge.

Sabotage Monsters, Inc.'s laugh power system and have Fear Co.'s machine of mixed scream and laugh power deployed (all failed).

Jailbreak M.E.R.C.'s custody (succeeded).

Fulfill his revenge against both Mike and Sulley upon lifetime resentment by ruining their lives through any random ways whatever's successfully possible, even mostly against them for his humiliating failure at the Scare Games since college.

Get his revenge on all of Monstropolis.

Restore the cycle of monsters scaring children to it's previous glory out of hatefully despising collecting laugh power (all ongoing).

Aiding and abetting

Assault and battery

Attempted mass murder
